narrative:
Precinct Vernon Township B (precinct in Scioto County) has 809 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a clear Republican lean of 11.2 percentage points.
